    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static PackageReference
    PackageKit.createPackageReference(ProgramFactory f, Package p)
    Creates a new package reference derived by the name of the given package.
    static List<ClassType>
    PackageKit.getNonSourcePackageTypes(Package pkg)
    Query that collects all types in a package that are not available as sources.
    static boolean

    replaced by recoder.kit.transformation.RenamePackage
